items.title: [负面] I'd like to sink my teeth into this one, but I can...
items.summary:
I'd like to sink my teeth into this one, but I can't really. 

The English translation is GPT related, not reviewed, and overall poor. The user agreement is also in another language, which I can't really read or earnestly accept because of that. 

It looks so neat, and I would _love_ to try it, but... yeah, I can't. Perhaps a proper paid release with a translation could be nice? I dunno.

items.title:
[正面] Рекомендую.
Кайфую от всего геймплея и истории игр...
items.summary:
Рекомендую.
Кайфую от всего геймплея и истории игры.
Эта смесь гачи-новеллы-рогуелайта просто пушка.
-----------
Поиграв уже 1 год она до сих пор не надоела. Сюжет продолжает выходить, персонажи, которые появляются стали еще лучше и красочнее.

items.title: [正面] Stunning visuals and awesome game play, well round...
items.summary: Stunning visuals and awesome game play, well rounded game. The story is amazing and the fighting is in a style I didn't think I would enjoy but I enjoy it more than similar Cacha games. Super easy to get  for characters, as well as leveling up. Each character type has unique game play which are all enjoyable, my favourite is chaos, mainly for some characters, but the unique fighting element of chaos is so much fun to use.

items.title:
[正面] Addicted.
Definitely loves the lovecraftian concep...
items.summary:
Addicted.
Definitely loves the lovecraftian concepts for the characters. felt so original and fresh compared to all those other gacha games.

Here's what you should know abt the negative reviews other ppl leaves:
-Some reviews might say the translation is bad (since its from AI) but honestly, it's playable. And thats whats important.
-also some people are commenting about the character having no movement in lobby, but those are actually reserved for the USSR charas. (when I reviewed this, there's only 2 of them)
-there's this one dude that prefer this game to be full paid rather than gacha BUT i think gacha is what make this game special. 

you TOTALLY can grinds for gacha, and the game is nice enough to give you extra allowance once in a while (via events). it's totally possible to complete all the characters. If you get every character at once you wouldn't have the motivation to continue the main story. It's because you don't have everyone, you realize your team lacking something and always searching how to improve your team. It's fun!

items.title: [正面] 画风很精美，人设也比较讨喜，剧情和音乐也都没拖玩法后腿，总的来说是一款制作上来说很精致的二游，而且有...
items.summary: 画风很精美，人设也比较讨喜，剧情和音乐也都没拖玩法后腿，总的来说是一款制作上来说很精致的二游，而且有几个比较超模的队伍，也不难抽取，基本上可以说没有强度焦虑，非常适合闲暇之余消磨时间。

items.title: [正面] Very fun game with a nice art style and good story...
items.summary:
Very fun game with a nice art style and good story. If you like Slay the Spire and gacha games you will like this game. 
Only minor con is the AI translation can be a bit off at times, but it's still very understandable and better than most other AI translated things I've read before.
